name: Vietnamese bò lúc lắc (aka #shakingbeef)
recipeIngredient: ½ cup long cut green onion pieces I like to sauté with chunky cut onions and peppers but you can omit if preferred
Pickled Red onions (peep my YouTube for recipe)
recipeInstructions: Instructions: In a mixing bowl combine your beef and seasonings and wrap them to marinate for 1-2 hrs.

Heat up your wok or iron skillet rippin’ hot for that good char. Add in your oil to coat and heat. *At this point sauté onions and peppers til semi soft and remove from pan, if adding. Add in your beef and stir fry. Let them sit for a good 2-3 minutes.
Shaking the wok/skillet continuously adds more flavor and give you that thick glaze consistency, then add (veggies if using) and green onion
Dress up your veggies and pour on your sizzling beef in the middle of the plate to serve—I like making them into lettuce wraps
Enjoy with a bowl of hot steaming Jasmin rice or room temp cooked rice noodles for the wraps and get after it. LFG!
